name: Arcane Arts Expansion
description: Adds new magical classes, spells, and enchanted items

elementalist.name: Elementalist
elementalist.description: Master of the four elements: fire, water, earth, and air

summoner.name: Summoner
summoner.description: Calls forth creatures from other planes to aid in battle

bookContent.summoning_tome: The ancient art of summoning requires perfect control over one's will and mana. The tome details rituals for calling forth imps, elementals, and otherworldly beings. Warning: Poorly executed summons can have disastrous consequences.
bookContent.elemental_codex: The four elements - fire, water, earth, air - each have their own properties and weaknesses. Master them all to become a true elementalist. Fire burns bright but can be extinguished. Water flows but can be contained. Earth stands firm but can be eroded. Air moves freely but can be still.
bookContent.arcane_grimoire: Advanced magical theory and spell construction. Learn to weave mana into complex patterns that defy the laws of nature. Includes forbidden knowledge that could corrupt the unwary mage.

guilds.name: Arcane Academy
guilds.description: An institution dedicated to the advancement of magical knowledge and spellcraft

elemental_trials.title: Elemental Trials
elemental_trials.description: Prove your mastery over the four elements by defeating elemental guardians.

summoner_apprentice.title: Apprentice Summoner
summoner_apprentice.description: Learn the basics of summoning by successfully calling forth and controlling an imp.
